0: I see, so you've come for the treasure?
You should start by doing some research.

I can help you find the first key.
You should go South.
1:
The Dark Heart is hidden deep
within the castle.
Only those worthy can possess it.

Prove your worth by reaching
Level 3.
2: You have done well to reach Level 3.

You are now worthy to possess
the Dark Heart.
Take it and fulfill your destiny.
3:
I see you've defeated the castle's guardian
and claimed the Dark Heart.

0: Bring me iron ore\nfrom the mines.
1: Good iron!\nLet me work on this.
2: Your sword is ready!\nForged with care.
3: Need anything sharpened?\nI'm always at the anvil.

intro: ...Hey. I was ambushed on the road.
My arm is useless, and I can't swing anymore.
Take this sword. Use it better than I can right now.
If you find a bandage, come back. I still need help.
waiting: You're back... but I still need a bandage.
I'll hold on a little longer.
thanks: Thank you. Here, take these 25 coins for the trouble.
done: Keep the sword. You earned it.

intro:
Fresh fruits for sale!
Best in the castle!
I have apples, oranges, and bananas.

Care for some?
They might help you on your journey.
waiting: I have more fruits if you need them.

Did you find any new ones?
I love trying new fruits!
thanks:
No way, you found a rare fruit!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your find.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more fruits?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love chatting about fruits!

training: I can teach you how to shoot arrows.
Practice makes perfect, so keep trying!
waiting: I have more arrows if you need them.

Did you find any new targets?
I love trying new challenges!
thanks:
No way, you hit the bullseye!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your skill.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more arrows?
I have plenty to share!

Feel free to come back anytime.
I love teaching archery!

training: I can teach you how to use different weapons.
Practice makes perfect, so keep trying!
waiting: I have more weapons if you need them.

Did you find any new challenges?
I love trying new things!
thanks:
No way, you mastered that weapon!
That's amazing!
Here, take this as a reward for your skill.
I hope it helps you on your adventure!
done:
In need of more weapons?
I have plenty to share!
